required_operator_inputs: build a behavior-preserving compiler-style layer for the viewer function library and Color Pipeline composition system
use Salticid-inspired ui.salt authoring and recipe materialization without adding a Salticid runtime dependency
materialize viewer-owned JSON contracts for function library, composition recipe, and Explaino semantics
freeze current UI behavior until generated metadata proves parity with the current hardcoded behavior
move backend lookup seams one at a time only after shadow parity is green
forbidden_operator_prompts: add new Color Pipeline composition UI in this slice
implement Factorio-style schedule workflow UI in this slice
implement boundary-masked SDF normal-angle beauty mode in this slice
add SDF operands or gates as first-class composition nodes in this slice
integrate Generic Equation Pack viewport work in this slice
add a Salticid sample_fn adapter in this slice
add SDF-native fractal lanes in this slice
import or run Salticid as a viewer runtime dependency
required_validation_commands: py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label ui_salt_contract_materializer_pytest --log artifacts/logs/ui_salt_contract_materializer_pytest.log --out-json artifacts/validation/ui_salt_contract_materializer_pytest.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 600 -- py -3.14 -m pytest tests/test_ui_salt_materializer.py -q

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The UI-Salt Explaino metadata lowering contract validates successfully
